howItWorks.title: Get started in 3 steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From sign-up to fully operational in just a few minutes. No installation, no credit card, no commitment.

01.title: Register organization
01.description: Create your organization account in seconds. Just your name, email, and company details.

02.title: Add your employees
02.description: Invite team members and set up departments, designations, and leave policies.

03.title: Start managing
03.description: Track attendance, manage leave requests, run performance reviews, and generate reports — all from day one.

items.a: RH_Eletropasso is a modern, open-source HR management platform that helps organizations manage attendance, leave, and employee records in one place. It works as a Progressive Web App (PWA) on any device.

Yes — completely free. It is open-source software with no paywalls, no user limits, and no credit card required. The app is ad-supported. If you would like to remove ads for your organization, you can make a small donation to support the project.

items.q: How do I register my organization?
items.a: Click "Get started free", fill in your organization name, admin email, and password. You'll receive a verification email to activate your account. Setup takes less than 5 minutes.
Absolutely. You can create unlimited departments and designations, assign employees, and track attendance and leave per department.
Employees check in by taking a selfie through the app. The system captures the photo along with GPS coordinates and timestamp, ensuring authentic and verifiable attendance records.
RH_Eletropasso supports Office mode (standard check-in/out) and Factory mode (shift-based tracking). Admins can configure which modes are available for their organization.

items.q: How do employees apply for leave?
items.a: Employees select their leave type, dates, and add an optional reason through the app. Managers receive a notification and can approve or reject with one click.

items.q: Can I configure custom leave types?
items.a: Yes. Admins can create custom leave types with configurable annual allowances, carry-over rules, and approval workflows.

Performance reviews follow a 3-step flow: employees complete a self-assessment, their manager provides an evaluation, and HR finalizes the review. Each step includes customizable competencies and a configurable rating scale.

items.q: Can I customize the review competencies and rating scale?
items.a: Yes. Admins can configure competencies, behaviors, and rating scale labels from organization settings. This lets you tailor reviews to match your company's values and evaluation criteria.

items.q: Do I need to download the app from an app store?
items.a: No! RH_Eletropasso is a Progressive Web App (PWA). Just visit the URL in your browser and install it to your home screen — no app store needed.
The app caches essential UI resources for fast loading. However, real-time features like attendance check-in require an internet connection.

items.q: Is there a free trial or time limit?
items.a: There is no trial period because RH_Eletropasso is permanently free. There are no time limits, no feature gates, and no employee caps.

items.q: How do I remove ads from my organization?
items.a: You can remove ads by making a donation to support the project through GitHub Sponsors. Once your sponsorship is confirmed, ads will be disabled for your organization.

items.q: What features should I look for in HR management software?
items.a: A good HRMS should include attendance tracking, leave management, an employee directory, and reporting tools. RH_Eletropasso provides all of these plus performance reviews and GPS geofencing — free in one open-source platform.

items.q: Can small businesses use RH_Eletropasso for free?
items.a: Absolutely. RH_Eletropasso has no user limits, no employee caps, and no feature restrictions — small businesses and large enterprises get the same full-featured, free experience.

items.q: How is RH_Eletropasso different from other HR platforms?
items.a: Unlike proprietary HR software, RH_Eletropasso is completely open-source — you can inspect the code, self-host it, or customize it. It also works as a PWA, so employees can check in from any device without downloading an app.

items.q: Does RH_Eletropasso support multi-location attendance tracking?
items.a: Yes. RH_Eletropasso supports GPS geofencing, allowing you to define office locations and verify that employees are checking in from authorized sites.

seo.landingTitle: RH_Eletropasso — Free Open-Source HR Management Software
seo.landingDescription: RH_Eletropasso is a free, open-source HR platform with attendance tracking, leave management, and employee directory. Get started today — no credit card required.
seo.softwareDescription: Free, open-source HR management system with attendance tracking, leave management, employee directory, and compliance tools.

hero.title: Modern HR management
hero.subtitle: RH_Eletropasso is a free, open-source HR management platform trusted by growing teams. Track attendance with selfie-based check-ins, manage leave with one click, and keep employee records organized — all from one intuitive dashboard. No downloads, no credit card — get started in minutes.
hero.installIosIntro: Install RH_Eletropasso on your iPhone or iPad:
hero.installIosStep1: 1. Tap the Share button in Safari
hero.installAndroidStep2: 2. Select Install App or Add to Home Screen

featuresSection.title: Everything you need
featuresSection.subtitle: One platform to manage your entire HR workflow — from attendance to performance reviews. Whether you're a small business or a growing team, RH_Eletropasso adapts to your needs.

attendance-tracking.title: Attendance tracking
attendance-tracking.description: Selfie-based check-in with GPS geofencing and real-time monitoring. Supports office and factory shift modes with biometric verification.

leave-management.title: Leave management
leave-management.description: Custom leave types, automated balance calculations, and configurable approval workflows. Employees apply in seconds; managers approve with one click.

employee-directory.title: Employee directory
employee-directory.description: Complete employee profiles with department, designation, and role-based access. Self-service portal lets employees update their own information.

reports-analytics.title: Reports & analytics
reports-analytics.description: Comprehensive attendance summaries, leave reports, and data-driven insights. Export to CSV for payroll integration and compliance audits.

performance-reviews.title: Performance reviews
performance-reviews.description: Structured review cycles with self-assessments, manager evaluations, and HR finalization. Customizable competencies and rating scales.

pricing.title: Completely free. No catch.
pricing.subtitle: RH_Eletropasso is free and open-source software. Every feature is available to every organization — no paywalls, no user limits, no credit card required.
pricing.priceBlurb: All features included. No hidden fees. No premium tiers. Just free, open-source HR software for everyone.
pricing.supportBody: RH_Eletropasso is independently maintained and funded by the community. If you'd like to remove ads from your organization, you can make a small donation to support development — any amount helps keep the project alive.

testimonials.title: Trusted by growing teams
testimonials.subtitle: See why organizations choose RH_Eletropasso for their HR management needs.

items.quote: RH_Eletropasso transformed how we manage our team. Attendance tracking went from spreadsheets to a one-click selfie check-in. Our HR department saves hours every week.
items.name: Rajesh Kumar

items.quote: We evaluated 5 different HR platforms before choosing RH_Eletropasso. The selfie-based attendance and GPS tracking eliminated buddy punching overnight. Highly recommend for any growing business.
items.name: Sarah Chen

items.quote: As a non-profit, we needed a free HR solution that didn't compromise on features. RH_Eletropasso's leave management and employee directory are exactly what we needed. The PWA works great on our field staff's phones.
items.name: David Okafor

aboutPage.seoTitle: About RH_Eletropasso — Free Open-Source HR Management Platform
aboutPage.seoDescription: Learn about the team, mission, and values behind RH_Eletropasso. A free, open-source HR platform built to make HR management accessible to organizations of every size.
aboutPage.title: About RH_Eletropasso
aboutPage.intro: We're on a mission to make HR management accessible, transparent, and free for organizations everywhere. RH_Eletropasso is a community-driven, open-source HR platform built for the modern workplace.
aboutPage.storyP1: RH_Eletropasso was born out of a simple frustration: HR software is too expensive and too complicated for most organizations. Small businesses, startups, non-profits, and growing teams were being priced out of tools they desperately needed — forced to choose between overpriced enterprise platforms and error-prone spreadsheets.
aboutPage.storyP2: We asked a different question: What if essential HR tools were free, open-source, and actually easy to use?
aboutPage.storyP3: Starting in 2024, we began building RH_Eletropasso as an open-source project — a Progressive Web App that works on any device, with no downloads, no per-user pricing, and no hidden costs. Attendance tracking with selfie verification. Leave management with one-click approvals. Employee directories. Performance reviews. Reports. Everything a growing team needs, completely free.
aboutPage.storyP4: Today, RH_Eletropasso is used by organizations across multiple countries, helping HR teams save hours every week and giving employees a modern, intuitive experience. And because it's open source, the community continuously improves it.
aboutPage.missionText: To democratize HR technology by building the world's most accessible, transparent, and community-driven human resources platform — freely available to every organization, everywhere.

freeForever.title: Free forever
freeForever.description: We believe that essential HR tools should be accessible to every organization, regardless of budget. The core platform is and always will be free.

openSource.title: Open source
openSource.description: Transparency builds trust. Our code is public, our roadmap is open, and anyone can contribute. No vendor lock-in, no hidden fees, no surprises.

community.title: Community-driven
community.description: RH_Eletropasso is shaped by the people who use it. Feature requests, bug reports, and community contributions directly influence our development priorities.

scale.title: Built for scale
scale.description: Whether you have 5 employees or 500, RH_Eletropasso scales with you. Role-based access control, multi-department support, and configurable workflows adapt to your needs.

aboutPage.openSourceBody: RH_Eletropasso is licensed under the MIT license. Our entire codebase is available on GitHub. You can inspect the code, suggest improvements, report issues, or even self-host your own instance.
aboutPage.ctaBody: Join organizations around the world that use RH_Eletropasso to manage their HR. Free forever, no credit card required.

featuresPage.seoDescription: Explore all RH_Eletropasso features: selfie-based attendance with GPS, leave management, employee directory, performance reviews, reports, and more. Free and open-source.
featuresPage.title: All-in-one HR management
featuresPage.subtitle: Everything you need to manage attendance, leave, employees, performance reviews, and reports — in one free, open-source platform.
featuresPage.platformSubtitle: Beyond core HR features, RH_Eletropasso is designed to be fast, accessible, and customizable.

anyDevice.title: Works on any device
anyDevice.description: Progressive Web App that works on phones, tablets, and desktops. Install it like a native app — no app store needed.

cloud.title: Cloud-based & always available
cloud.description: Access your HR system from anywhere. All data is securely stored in the cloud with automatic backups.

notifications.title: Real-time notifications
notifications.description: Email and in-app notifications for leave requests, approvals, attendance alerts, and announcements.

secure.title: Secure & private
secure.description: Role-based access control ensures employees only see what they should. All data is encrypted and protected.

customizable.title: Customizable
customizable.description: Configure departments, designations, leave types, review cycles, themes, and more to match your organization.

featuresPage.comparisonSubtitle: Get more features out of the box — without the per-user pricing.
featuresPage.ctaBody: Join organizations already using RH_Eletropasso. Free to start, no credit card required.

attendance-tracking.title: Attendance management
attendance-tracking.subtitle: Selfie-based check-in with GPS tracking
attendance-tracking.description: Eliminate buddy punching and manual timesheets with photo-verified attendance. Employees check in by taking a selfie through the app, which captures their photo along with GPS coordinates and a timestamp.
subFeatures: Selfie-based check-in with automatic photo capture
GPS location tracking for on-site verification
Real-time attendance dashboard with live status
Attendance logs with filtering, search, and audit trail
Late arrival and early departure tracking
Admin override and manual adjustment capabilities

leave-management.title: Leave management
leave-management.subtitle: Complete leave lifecycle from request to approval
leave-management.description: Streamline your entire leave process. Employees can apply for leave in seconds, managers get instant notifications for one-click approval, and HR has full visibility into leave balances.
subFeatures: One-click leave application with date range picker
Configurable leave types (annual, sick, casual, custom)
Annual allowance and balance tracking per employee
Manager approval workflow with email notifications
Leave calendar view for team availability
Automatic balance calculations and carry-over rules

employee-directory.title: Employee directory
employee-directory.subtitle: Centralized employee profiles and org structure
employee-directory.description: Maintain a complete digital record of every team member. From personal details and job information to department assignments and reporting structure.
subFeatures: Complete employee profiles with personal and job details
Role-based access control (Admin, HR, Manager, Employee)

reports-analytics.title: Reports & analytics
reports-analytics.subtitle: Data-driven insights for better HR decisions
reports-analytics.description: Turn your HR data into actionable insights. Generate comprehensive reports on attendance patterns, leave utilization, and team performance.
subFeatures: Attendance summary reports by employee, department, or date range
Export to CSV for payroll integration

performance-reviews.title: Performance reviews
performance-reviews.subtitle: Structured review cycles with multi-level evaluation
performance-reviews.description: Run fair, transparent, and consistent performance reviews. Define custom competencies, set rating scales, and execute structured review cycles.
subFeatures: Configurable review cycles with custom periods
Customizable competency frameworks and rating scales
Attendance and leave integration in review cards

gps-geofencing.title: GPS & location verification
gps-geofencing.subtitle: Verify employee location at check-in
gps-geofencing.description: Every attendance check-in captures GPS coordinates alongside the selfie, providing location verification for remote teams, field workers, and multi-location organizations.
subFeatures: Field worker and remote team tracking

biometric-selfie-verification.title: Biometric selfie verification
biometric-selfie-verification.subtitle: Photo-verified attendance without hardware
biometric-selfie-verification.description: No fingerprint scanners or special hardware needed. RH_Eletropasso uses the camera on any smartphone to verify employee identity at check-in.

privacyPage.seoDescription: Learn how RH_Eletropasso collects, uses, and protects your personal data. Read our full privacy policy covering cookies, data retention, and your rights.

sections.s1P1: Welcome to RH_Eletropasso ("we", "our", "us"). We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our HR management platform (the "Service").
sections.s1P2: By using the Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy. If you do not agree with the terms of this policy, please do not access the Service.
sections.s2Intro: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:
s2Items: Account Information: Name, email address, organization name, and role when you register.
Employee Data: Employee profiles, attendance records, leave applications, and related HR data entered by your organization.
Usage Data: Information about how you interact with the Service, including pages visited, features used, and actions taken.
Device Information: Browser type, operating system, device type, and IP address.
Location Data: Approximate location data used for attendance tracking features, only when explicitly enabled by your organization.
Camera Data: Camera images used for attendance verification, processed locally on your device and stored securely.
sections.s3Intro: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience:
s3Items: Essential Cookies: Required for the Service to function properly (authentication, session management).
Analytics Cookies: We may use analytics to understand how visitors interact with our website. These cookies are only loaded after you provide consent.
Performance Monitoring: We may use performance monitoring tools for usage insights.
sections.s3P2: You can choose to accept or decline analytics cookies through the consent banner. You can change your preference at any time by clearing your browser's local storage for this site.
sections.s4Intro: We use the information we collect to:
s4Items: Provide, operate, and maintain the Service.
Process attendance records, leave applications, and other HR functions.
Send you account-related notifications and verification emails.
Improve and optimize the Service through analytics.
Detect and prevent fraud, abuse, and security issues.
sections.s5Body: Your data is stored securely using PocketBase as our backend database. We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
sections.s6Intro: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your data only in these circumstances:
s6Items: Within Your Organization: HR administrators and managers within your organization can access relevant employee data as permitted by their role.
Service Providers: We use third-party services (hosting, analytics) that may process data on our behalf.
Legal Requirements: When required by law, regulation, or legal process.
sections.s7Intro: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:
s7Items: Access: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
Correction: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
Deletion: Request deletion of your personal data, subject to legal obligations.
Portability: Request a copy of your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
Withdraw Consent: Withdraw consent for analytics tracking at any time via the cookie settings.
sections.s7P2: Organization administrators can manage and export their organization's data through the Service's built-in tools.
sections.s8Body: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you the Service. If you or your organization administrator requests account deletion, we will delete your data within 30 days, except where we are required to retain it for legal or compliance purposes.
sections.s9Body: The Service is not intended for individuals under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you become aware that a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us and we will take steps to delete such information.
sections.s10Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by updating the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.
sections.s11Intro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact your organization administrator or the system operator.

termsPage.seoDescription: Read the Terms of Service for RH_Eletropasso. Understand your rights, responsibilities, and the rules governing use of our open-source HR management platform.

sections.s1Body: By accessing or using RH_Eletropasso ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not access or use the Service. These Terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use the Service.
sections.s2Body: RH_Eletropasso is an open-source HR management platform that provides tools for attendance tracking, leave management, employee directory management, reporting, and other human resource functions. The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" for organizations and their authorized users.
s3Items: You must register an organization account to use the Service. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.
You must provide accurate and complete information during registration and keep your account information up to date.
You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account.
Organization administrators are responsible for managing user access and permissions within their organization.
You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account or any other security breach.
sections.s4Intro: You agree not to use the Service to:
s4Items: Violate any applicable laws, regulations, or third-party rights.
Upload or transmit viruses, malware, or other malicious code.
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Service, other accounts, or related systems.
Use the Service for any purpose other than legitimate HR management activities.
Interfere with or disrupt the integrity or performance of the Service.
Store or process sensitive personal data beyond what is necessary for HR management purposes.
Use the Service to send spam, unsolicited communications, or for phishing purposes.
sections.s5Body: Your organization retains ownership of all data entered into the Service ("Organization Data"). We do not claim ownership over your Organization Data. You grant us a limited license to host, store, and process your Organization Data solely for the purpose of providing the Service. Organization administrators can export and delete their data at any time through the Service's built-in tools.
sections.s6Body: The Service offers both free and paid subscription plans. Paid plans may provide additional features. Payment terms, pricing, and plan details are displayed within the Service. We reserve the right to modify pricing with reasonable notice.
sections.s7Body: RH_Eletropasso is an open-source project. The source code is available under its respective open-source license on GitHub. These Terms of Service govern your use of the hosted Service. If you choose to self-host the application, the open-source license terms apply to the software, while these Terms do not apply to self-hosted instances.
sections.s8Body: We strive to maintain the availability and reliability of the Service, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation. We may temporarily suspend the Service for maintenance, updates, or other operational reasons.
sections.s9Body: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, RH_Eletropasso and its contributors shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, data, use, or goodwill, arising out of or in connection with your use of the Service.
sections.s10Body: The Service is provided on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis, without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
sections.s11Body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the Service at any time, with or without cause, with or without notice. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease. You may also terminate your account at any time by contacting us.
sections.s12Body: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will provide notice of material changes by updating the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. Your continued use of the Service after any changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
sections.s13Body: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws applicable to your jurisdiction, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising under these Terms shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation before pursuing formal legal action.
sections.s14Intro: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact your organization administrator or the system operator.
